---
title: "Module 9: Disease mapping and GIS"
format:
  revealjs:
    toc: false
---

## 2026 placeholder

Alex will lead this Day 3 core module. The final disease mapping and GIS deck
will be added here when it is ready.

For now, this placeholder keeps the public schedule and navigation path stable.

## Planned scope

- How spatial data show up in infectious disease analysis.
- Basic GIS concepts needed to read, map, and interpret spatial data.
- Disease mapping examples that connect spatial patterns to public health
  questions.

## Course connection

This session is part of the 2026 core schedule and is separate from the optional
or archived advanced materials.
